briefdescription.para: This function tests the functioning of the Cortex A9 Scu Private Timer driver and hardware using interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the instance of XScuTimer driver.
is the base address of the XScuTimer device.

simplesect.para: In XSCT/classic flow, DeviceId is used to look up the device configuration.

briefdescription.para: This function is the Interrupt handler for the Timer interrupt of the Timer device.

detaileddescription.para: It is called on the expiration of the timer counter in interrupt context.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the callback function.

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the Cortex A9 Scu Private Timer interrupt example.
This file contains a design example using the Cortex A9 Scu Private Timer and the driver (XScuTimer) using interrupts.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a nm 03/10/10 First release 2.5 dp 07/11/23 Add Support for system device tree flow 2.5 dp 09/08/23 Update example to stop timer at the end of the test 2.6 ml 12/07/23 Make TimerExpired as a static variable. 2.8 bdk 12/08/25 Updated comments to support SDT flow for Doxygen documentation.
